title: New Hosteltur Community Homepage
body:
[![http://flickr.com/photos/diluvi/3080368329/](http://farm4.static.flickr.com/3152/3080368329_456c3cfe7e_m.jpg "Hosteltur Community")](http://comunidad.hosteltur.com/)

[Hosteltur](http://www.hosteltur.com) is a tourism information portal that  recently launched a website to create a [community of tourism professionals](/comunidad-de-profesionales-del-turismo/); this social network has evolved, and the previous design needed a redesign. Recently, the [Hosteltur Community](http://www.xarop.com/comunidad-de-profesionales-del-turismo/) has revamped its homepage to make it more user-friendly; from there, we now have an overview of the main sections and can access them more directly. I personally worked on the design and usability of both the original and this new homepage.
